function: () => { const r = { viewport: { w: window.innerWidth, h: window.innerHeight }, dpr: window.devicePixelRatio }; r.title = document.title; r.lang = document.documentElement.lang; const headings = [...document.querySelectorAll('h1, h2, h3, h4')].map(h => ({ tag: h.tagName.toLowerCase(), text: h.textContent.trim().slice(0, 60) })); r.headings = headings; r.headingLevels = new Set(headings.map(h => h.tag)); const imgs = [...document.images]; r.imgs = { total: imgs.length, missingAlt: imgs.filter(i => !i.alt).length }; const links = [...document.querySelectorAll('a[href]')]; r.links = { total: links.length, external: links.filter(a => /^https?:/.test(a.href)).length, noText: links.filter(a => !a.textContent.trim()).length }; const buttons = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')]; r.buttons = buttons.length; const inputs = [...document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea,select')]; r.inputs = inputs.length; r.landmarks = { main: !!document.querySelector('main'), header: !!document.querySelector('header'), footer: !!document.querySelector('footer'), nav: !!document.querySelector('nav') }; r.navAriaLabel = document.querySelector('nav')?.getAttribute('aria-label') || null; const cssVars = ['--ink', '--paper', '--accent', '--gold', '--glass-bg', '--blur-md', '--radius-lg', '--mesh-1', '--mesh-2']; r.designTokens = cssVars.map(v => [v, getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue(v).trim() || null]); r.bodyOverflowX = getComputedStyle(document.body).overflowX; r.bodyScrollWidth = document.body.scrollWidth; r.docScrollWidth = document.documentElement.scrollWidth; r.hasHorizontalScroll = r.docScrollWidth > window.innerWidth + 1; return r; }
